scripts.test:unit: NODE_ENV=test node --test tests/application.test.js tests/assistant.test.js tests/credential-vault.test.js tests/domain.test.js tests/events.test.js tests/floorplan.test.js tests/postgres-store.test.js tests/turnstile.test.js tests/tuya.test.js
scripts.test:integration: NODE_ENV=test node --test tests/api.test.js tests/auth.test.js tests/integrations.test.js tests/security-observability.test.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run env:check && npm audit --audit-level=high
